name: Moonlight-16B-A3B
tagline: Open 16B-parameter MoE (3B active) available in base and Instruct variants on Hugging Face.
metaDescription: Moonlight-16B-A3B (Moonshot AI (Kimi)) — part of the Moonlight line. Open 16B-parameter MoE (3B active) available in base and Instruct variants on Hugging Face.
overview: Moonlight-16B-A3B is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Moonlight line. Open-weight 16B/A3B MoE research model line trained with the Muon optimizer.
What's notable in this version: Open 16B-parameter MoE (3B active) available in base and Instruct variants on Hugging Face.
